refined_question: What causes instability and collapse in reinforcement learning (RL) agents after policy updates, and how can training sensitivity to learning rate be mitigated in RL?
intent: Understand the factors contributing to training instability and sensitivity to hyperparameters in reinforcement learning, specifically in the context of policy updates and learning rate selection
excluded_topics: scaling parameter count as primary solution
search_hint: reinforcement learning, policy updates, training instability, learning rate sensitivity, RL stability, policy gradient methods, Q-learning, actor-critic methods, deep reinforcement learning, hyperparameter tuning
